name: CENTRAIS EL.BR.EL.PFD ADR
summary: CENTRAIS EL.BR.EL.PFD ADR is an American Depositary Receipt (ADR) representing preferred shares of Centrais Elétricas Brasileiras S.A. (Eletrobras), a Brazilian electric utility company. Eletrobras is involved in the generation, transmission, and distribution of electricity in Brazil. The company is based in Rio de Janeiro.
